creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #76)

yes, I did. as we see on Comment 69 this was the command line I ran:

# date ; ntpq -4 -n -c rl -wp localhost ; service ntpd stop ; rm /var/db/ntp/ntpd.drift ; ntpdate ntp2.prod.localdomain.de ; service ntpd start ; sleep 1800 ; date ; ntpq -4 -n -c rl -wp localhost
